comments.author: akshatvishu
comments.body:
Looks like `hunyuan_image_3_moe.yaml` forces the two-stage Instruct topology (AR -> Diffusion) instead of letting `modes` filter it out like the old config did, see https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-omni/pull/2713

Because of that, running the Base model on this config crashes during AR init:

```python
ratio_36 = tokenizer.convert_tokens_to_ids("<img_ratio_36>")
self._ratio_other_slices = [(ratio_33, ratio_36 + 1)] # Crashes here: None + 1

```

The Base tokenizer doesn't have `<img_ratio_36>`. Tencent's reference code guards against this by checking `model_version == "HunyuanImage-3.0"`.

ref: <https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanImage-3.0/blob/main/hunyuan_image_3/tokenization_hunyuan_image_3.py#L613>

### Proposed Fix

1. **Fix Docs:** Clarify that Base must use `hunyuan_image3_dit.yaml` (single-stage DiT), while Instruct uses `hunyuan_image_3_moe.yaml`.
2. **Add a Guard:** Fail fast with a clean error message if someone tries to load the Base model with the MoE/Instruct config.

Can you check if base model runs fine with `hunyuan_image3_dit.yaml` ? I don't have the hardware capacity required by  `hunyuan_image3` to check this!

comments.author: FayeSpica
comments.body:
> Looks like `hunyuan_image_3_moe.yaml` forces the two-stage Instruct topology (AR -> Diffusion) instead of letting `modes` filter it out like the old config did, see [#2713](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-omni/pull/2713)
> 
> Because of that, running the Base model on this config crashes during AR init:
> 
> ratio_36 = tokenizer.convert_tokens_to_ids("<img_ratio_36>")
> self._ratio_other_slices = [(ratio_33, ratio_36 + 1)] # Crashes here: None + 1
> The Base tokenizer doesn't have `<img_ratio_36>`. Tencent's reference code guards against this by checking `model_version == "HunyuanImage-3.0"`.
> 
> ref: https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanImage-3.0/blob/main/hunyuan_image_3/tokenization_hunyuan_image_3.py#L613
> 
> ### Proposed Fix
> 1. **Fix Docs:** Clarify that Base must use `hunyuan_image3_dit.yaml` (single-stage DiT), while Instruct uses `hunyuan_image_3_moe.yaml`.
> 2. **Add a Guard:** Fail fast with a clean error message if someone tries to load the Base model with the MoE/Instruct config.
> 
> Can you check if base model runs fine with `hunyuan_image3_dit.yaml` ? I don't have the hardware capacity required by `hunyuan_image3` to check this!

Agreed on both. 
I confirmed it runs fine with `hunyuan_image3_dit.yaml`: 

```shell
vllm serve tencent/HunyuanImage-3.0 --omni --port 8091 --deploy-config vllm_omni/deploy/hunyuan_image3_dit.yaml --trust-remote-code
```

comments.author: Gaohan123
comments.body: Please open a new issue for tracking the improvement. Thanks. @FayeSpica

title: [Bug]: tencent/HunyuanImage-3.0: crash on init when tokenizer lacks extended ratio tokens (<img_ratio_33..36>) — base checkpoint raises TypeError: NoneType + int
